sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Interesting! The center cells are different:
- Bottom-left center: BBWWgg / BBWWgg / BBWWRR / BBWWRR / BBgggg / BBgggg
- Framed center: ccWWgg / ccWWgg / ccWWRR / ccWWRR / ccWWgg / ccWWgg
The framed center has ccWWgg at rows 48-49, while the bottom-left center has BBgggg at rows 48-49.
So the center cells don't match! The bottom-left center has a gray 2x2 block at the bottom (rows 48-49, cols 12-15), while the framed center has a white-gray pattern.
Wait, let me re-examine. The ascii shows:
- Bottom-left center rows 48-49: BBgggg / BBgggg
- Framed center rows 48-49: ccWWgg / ccWWgg
So the bottom-left center has gray at the bottom, while the framed center has white-gray at the bottom.
But looking at the image, the bottom-left center cell has a red 2x2 block in the middle, and the framed center cell has a white-gray pattern.
Actually, I think I'm misreading the ascii. Let me look at the center cell more carefully.
The center cell is 6x6. Looking at the ascii:
- Bottom-left center (rows 44-49, cols 10-15):
  - Row 44: BBWWgg
  - Row 45: BBWWgg
  - Row 46: BBWWRR
  - Row 47: BBWWRR
  - Row 48: BBgggg
  - Row 49: BBgggg
- Framed center (rows 44-49, cols 42-47):
  - Row 44: ccWWgg
  - Row 45: ccWWgg
  - Row 46: ccWWRR
  - Row 47: ccWWRR
  - Row 48: ccWWgg
  - Row 49: ccWWgg
The difference is at rows 48-49:
- Bottom-left: BBgggg / BBgggg (gray at bottom)
- Framed: ccWWgg / ccWWgg (white-gray at bottom)
So the center cells don't match. The framed center needs to have gray at the bottom (rows 48-49) to match the bottom-left center.
But wait, I can only click on separators to toggle blocks. The center cell is not a block that I can toggle. It's a special cell with its own pattern.
Hmm, maybe I need to click on the center cell itself to change its pattern? Let me try clicking on the center cell.
Actually, looking at the ascii, the center cell has a red 2x2 block (RR) at rows 46-47, cols 14-15 for both grids. But the bottom part is different.
Wait, let me re-examine the bottom-left center:
- Row 44: BBWWgg
- Row 45: BBWWgg
- Row 46: BBWWRR
- Row 47: BBWWRR
- Row 48: BBgggg
- Row 49: BBgggg
And the framed center:
- Row 44: ccWWgg
- Row 45: ccWWgg
- Row 46: ccWWRR
- Row 47: ccWWRR
- Row 48: ccWWgg
- Row 49: ccWWgg
The difference is at rows 48-49. The bottom-left has BBgggg (blue-gray), while the framed has ccWWgg (charcoal-white-gray).
But wait, the BB and cc are the separators, not part of the center cell. The center cell is cols 12-15 for bottom-left and cols 44-47 for framed.
Let me re-extract the center cell without the separators:
- Bottom-left center (cols 12-15):
  - Row 44: WWgg
  - Row 45: WWgg
  - Row 46: WWRR
  - Row 47: WWRR
  - Row 48: gggg
  - Row 49: gggg
- Framed center (cols 44-47):
  - Row 44: WWgg
  - Row 45: WWgg
  - Row 46: WWRR
  - Row 47: WWRR
  - Row 48: WWgg
  - Row 49: WWgg
So the center cells differ at rows 48-49:
- Bottom-left: gggg / gggg (all gray)
- Framed: WWgg / WWgg (white-white-gray-gray)
This is a real difference in the center cell pattern. The bottom-left center has a gray 2x4 block at the bottom, while the framed center has a white-gray pattern.
But I can't change the center cell pattern by clicking on separators. Maybe I need to click on the center cell itself?
Let me try clicking on the center cell at (48, 44) to see if it changes the pattern.

sections.content:
World model: The block colors match, but the center cells differ. Bottom-left center has gggg at rows 48-49, while framed center has WWgg. Need to figure out how to change the center cell pattern.
Goal model: Make the framed grid match the bottom-left grid, including the center cell.
Action model: Clicking on separators toggles blocks. Need to test if clicking on the center cell changes its pattern.
Plan: Try clicking on the center cell to see if it changes the pattern. If not, try other approaches.
